name: Aniseed Chrabeli
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle baking sheets with flour.
2. In a large bowl, beat sugar and eggs until creamy. Stir in flour.
3. Add aniseed and lemon peel. Shape dough into half-inch ropes.
4. Cut ropes into three-inch lengths; curve each piece into a half-moon shape.
5. Slash outer edge of half-moon in three places with a sharp knife.
6. Place on prepared baking sheets.
7. Cover and let stand overnight at room temperature.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake cookies for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden.
9. Remove from baking sheets immediately; cool on rack.
This cookie is very hard and crisp. It makes an excellent "dunking" cookie!
